action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 6 took 88 minutes (too slow). Best score is 0.4221 from iter 4 (30 epochs, ~280s). I have 1.77 hours left. Analysis: Need faster approach. The ViT-B/16 pretrained model has much richer features. I can freeze the backbone and just train a linear classifier with replay - this will be much faster and potentially better. Decision: Submit eval on current best checkpoint (iter 4's 0.4221), then try ViT with frozen backbone + herding exemplar selection + larger memory.
